name: Shrimp with Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and devein shrimp, leaving the tail shell attached.
2. Chop fermented black beans.
3. Heat a 12-inch wok or 10-inch skillet over high heat for 30 seconds.
4. Pour in 2 tablespoons of oil and swirl to coat the pan. Reduce heat to moderate if the oil begins to smoke.
5. Add shrimp and stir-fry for about 1 minute, or until pink.
6. Stir in sherry, then remove the shrimp mixture to a plate.
7. Add remaining 2 tablespoons oil to the pan. Stir in fermented black beans and garlic.
8. Cook for a few seconds, ensuring garlic doesn't burn.
9. Stir in soy sauce, sugar, pepper, scallions, and reserved shrimp.
10. Pour in chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
11. Dissolve 2 tablespoons cornstarch in 3 tablespoons chicken stock.
12. Add the dissolved cornstarch mixture to the pan.
13. When sauce thickens and becomes clear (about 30 seconds), pour in beaten eggs slowly.
14. Gently lift the contents of the pan with a large spoon so that the eggs meld with all ingredients without further cooking.
15. Transfer to a heated plate and serve.
